title: Appellate Quarterly - October 2025
content:
## Appellate Quarterly - October 2025
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Appellate Litigation Group as we discuss appeals of importance to the Canadian business community during the last quarter. Each session brings you up-to-date on recent appellate developments across Canada. Topics to be discussed this quarter include:
- Supreme Court of Canada : When may a Canadian court take jurisdiction over foreign defendants?
- Federal : When will the Federal Court of Appeal review an administrative decision and grant a stay? Lessons from the Universal Ostrich Farms saga.
- Ontario/Atlantic : Confirming a high bar for reasonable apprehension of bias in commercial arbitration: the sequel to Aroma.
- Québec : Good Faith, Bad Math: Quebec Court of Appeal Reverses $1M Award Against City in Public Tender Dispute.
- West : From Wormholes to Wallet Holes: Expert Evidence and Harsh Damages in Signalta v. CNRL.
Speakers include: Adam Goldenberg , Lyndsey Delamont , Moya Graham , Catherine Martin , and Jordan Bierkos . Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
